title: helianthemum nummularium subsp. tomentosum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium subsp. tomentosum, also known as rockrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. It is native to Europe and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum nummularium subsp. tomentosum include its ability to soothe skin irritations and reduce stress, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of rockrose include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal properties.
